name: Postly
description:
If you’re looking for a simple way to manage and organize your social media content, look to Postly. With a no-frills interface and an intuitive content calendar, it’s easy to build content for all of your socials. It's particularly popular among SMBs for its straightforward content scheduling and publishing tools. 

Here’s why you’ll appreciate it in your tech stack:

  • Pricing starts at $14.99/month with a free trial
  • Simple scheduling interface empowers you to plan and schedule posts across multiple platforms effortlessly
  • You’ll love the handy dandy content library. With it, you can organize and store content for easy access.
  • Enjoy effortless team collaboration. With smart approval workflows and a collaborative content calendar, your team members can contribute and collaborate with ease
  • Supported platforms include: Facebook, X, LinkedIn, Instagram, and Pinterest.

Key Features:

✅  Content scheduling

✅  Content library

✅ Collaborative workflows
what_people_say:
What people say :

Users appreciate the platform’s simplicity and ease of use, making it easy to maintain a consistent social media presence without adding hours of work to their team’s plate.

Here’s what customers think:

“Postly is great for straightforward scheduling. If we need stuff like analytics in the future, we’ll need to switch tools. But this gets the job done.”

“It’s user-friendly for sure. Love Postly.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Advanced analytics
  • 🚫 Social inbox
  • 🚫 Multi-brand management
